description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof and a light-colored exterior, surrounded by a low stone or concrete fence. The front features a prominent garage door, a main entryway with a covered porch, and several rectangular windows. The house has a mix of single and double windows, with some grouped vertically and others spaced apart. The rear and sides of the house are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements. The property is enclosed by a perimeter wall, and the roof overhangs provide shade to the entry and garage areas.
description: A two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof, light walls, a garage, and a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage door, main entryway with porch, and multiple windows.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the perimeter fence, back door, and fewer windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a clear view of the fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Side view showing the simple wall with a few windows and the roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a covered porch, single door, and minimal decorative elements
